body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-50076", "cvss": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data in the Java replace-resolve path in Apache Fory fory-core Java SDK before 1.1.0 on Java/JVM platforms allows a remote attacker to bypass class registration, TypeChecker, and DisallowedList checks and invoke classpath-present readResolve/readExternal hooks via crafted Fory serialized data.\n\nUsers are recommended to upgrade to version 1.1.0 or later, which fixes this issue.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.0052, "percentile": 0.40508}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8f39-v287-78jf", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-15T22:32:28Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f39-v287-78jf", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8f39-v287-78jf"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-50076"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-04T17:16:33Z", "published_at": "2026-06-04T18:30:32Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-50076", "https://fory.apache.org/security", "http://www.openwall.com/lists/oss-security/2026/06/04/4", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f39-v287-78jf"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/apache/fory", "summary": "Apache Fory Java SDK Has Deserialization of Untrusted Data in the Java replace-resolve path", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-15T22:32:30Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8f39-v287-78jf", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.1.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.apache.fory:fory-core"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.1.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Apache Fory Java SDK Has Deserialization of Untrusted Data in the Java replace-resolve path
